ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the gene */,
  "gene_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the gene name */,
  "gene_organism" TEXT /* The organism in which the gene is found */,
  "gene_external_id" TEXT /* External identifiers (e.g., NCBI Gene ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcription_factors" (
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription factor */,
  "tf_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcription factor */,
  "tf_type" TEXT /* Type of the transcription factor (e.g., activator, repressor) */,
  "tf_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the transcription factor */,
  "tf_organism" TEXT /* The organism in which the transcription factor is found */,
  "tf_external_id" TEXT /* External identifiers (e.g., NCBI Protein ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_elements" (
  "re_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory element */,
  "re_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory element */,
  "re_type" TEXT /* Type of the regulatory element (e.g., enhancer, promoter) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the regulatory element is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the regulatory element on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the regulatory element on the chromosome */,
  "re_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the regulatory element */,
  "re_organism" TEXT /* The organism in which the regulatory element is found */,
  "re_external_id" TEXT /* External identifiers (e.g., ENCODE ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("re_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "ge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* The type of tissue in which the expression was measured */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for expression levels (e.g., TPM, FPKM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., ChIP-seq, RNA-seq) */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* The date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* The location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_pi" TEXT /* The principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "experiment_publication" TEXT /* A reference to the publication (e.g., DOI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tf_binding_sites" (
  "tbs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription factor binding site */,
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription factor */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the transcription factor binds */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcription factor binding site */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the transcription factor binding site */,
  "tbs_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the binding site */,
  "tbs_organism" TEXT /* The organism in which the binding site is found */,
  "tbs_external_id" TEXT /* External identifiers (e.g., JASPAR ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tbs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tf_binding_sites_tf_id FOREIGN KEY ("tf_id") REFERENCES transcription_factors ("tf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tf_binding_sites_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_name" TEXT /* Name of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_type" TEXT /* Type of the Gene Ontology term (e.g., molecular function, biological process) */,
  "go_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the GO term */,
  "go_organism" TEXT /* The organism associated with the GO term */,
  "go_external_id" TEXT /* External identifiers (e.g., GO ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_results" (
  "er_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment result */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "go_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the enrichment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "enrichment_method" TEXT /* The method used for enrichment analysis */,
  "enrichment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the enrichment result */,
  "enrichment_publication" TEXT /* A reference to the publication (e.g., DOI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("er_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_results_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_results_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_gene_sets" (
  "cgs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom gene set */,
  "cgs_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom gene set */,
  "gene_ids" TEXT /* List of gene IDs in the custom gene set */,
  "cgs_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the custom gene set */,
  "cgs_organism" TEXT /* The organism associated with the gene set */,
  "cgs_creator" TEXT /* The user who created the gene set */,
  "cgs_created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the gene set was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_gene_sets_gene_ids FOREIGN KEY ("gene_ids") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "al_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("al_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
